notes: notes about the component if any

cxPropShow.description: Set this property to true to show the alert, false to hide

cxPropPrimaryMessage.description: Text to be rendered as primary message of the alert.

cxPropHeading.description: Text to be rendered as heading of the alert.

cxPropSecondaryMessage.description: Text to be rendered as secondary message of the alert

cxPropType.description: This specifies the type of the alert

cxPropWrapperClass.description: This property sets given class to wrapper div of alert. This helps you to identify your alert and also to make specific style changes to it.

cxPropAllowMultiple.description: This property helps you to open multiple alerts/modals/popovers without closing the current alert.

cxPropTop.description: This property helps you to set the top property of the alert.

cxPropButtons.description: A JSON array of objects that consists of information of the buttons to be rendered in the alert. The object can consist of all properties supported by lyte-button.

cxPropShowCloseButton.description: Set this property to true to show close button of the alert.

cxPropCloseOnEscape.description: Set this property to false to prevent close of alert on escape keypress.

cxPropDimmer.description: This property helps you to set the dimmer color and opacity.

cxPropYield.description: Set this property to true to provide the content of the alert using yield.

cxPropAnimation.description: Sets the animation for the alert which will be shown while the alert opens.

cxPropContentAlign.description: Set this property to align the content of the alert

cxPropPreventFocus.description: If set to true, it will prevent initial focus on elements inside the alert. It is useful in those scenarios where any element rendered inside the alert has ltPropAutoFocus as true.

cxPropAria.description: This is a boolean property that indicates if aria attributes are provided using lt-prop-aria-attributes or not. Setting it to true indicates that some aria attributes are provided and those properties will be added to the alert element.

cxPropAriaAttributes.description: This property is used to get the aria properties that will be added to the alert element. For example, if role property is provided, then it is added to the div having class alertPopup. aria-labelledby is added to the header div of the alert and aria-describedby is added to the content div of the alert

cxPropFields.description: The fields or values to be listed should be passed in this property

cxPropSelectedFields.description: The fields (or values) selected should be passed in this property. Each array item should be an object with fields' id and api_name.

cxPropDisplayLabel.description: The key in cxPropFields that determines what should be displayed as a label.

cxPropMandatory.description: The key in cxPropFields that determines which field is mandatory

cxPropId.description: A unique identifier used to search across the items. Please note that this property is mandatory if you have more than one column list component in your page.

cxPropMaxSelectColumn.description: The maximum number of fields that can be selected by a user

cxPropDisableSortForUnselectedFields.description: Set this to true to disable sortable for unselected fields.

cxPropDataBind.description: Set this to true to disable data binding for the component. Disabling data binding will prevent changes made in setData to be reflected in DOM.

cxPropFieldYield.description: Set this to true to render your own field item instead of rendering the default field label.

cxPropDisableSortable.description: Set this to true to disable fields sortable.

cxPropHideSearch.description: Set this to true to disable search.

cxPropPreventSortableOnMandatoryFields.description: Set this to true to prevent sortable for mandatory fields

cxPropSearchAppearance.description: It defines the appearance of the lyte-input.

cxPropUniqueNameSelector.description: The key in cxPropFields which is used to uniquely identify the field.

cxPropMaxAccordianColumns.description: The maximum number of accordion groups whose fields can be selected by user.

cxPropZcqaPrefix.description: The string prefixed to each zcqa for the field's checkbox.

cxPropDragZcqaPrefix.description: The string prefixed to each zcqa for the fields' menu item.

cxPropPreventReordering.description: Set this to true to prevent reordering of fields on check/uncheck.

cxPropPinUnpinOption.description: Set this to true to enable the pin/unpin option. Note : A pinned field cannot be sortable.

cxPropPinFieldLimit.description: The maximum number of fields that can be pinned.

cxPropPinFieldLimitMessage.description: The tooltip message to be displayed when cxPropPinFieldLimit is reached.

cxPropPropertyFields.description: List of fields or values that are always displayed on top irrespective of their check/uncheck status. Note : These fields cannot be sortable.

cxPropSortOrder.description: Set this property to ascending/descending to enable sort for the list of unselected fields.

cxPropFixedColumns.description: The number of columns that are fixed in a list starting. These fixed fields will not be sortable

cxPropMinSelectColumn.description: The minimum number of fields that have to be selected.

cxPropTrimSearch.description: Set to false to prevent trim of search value

cxPropFiltering.description: Set as false to display all fields passed under cxPropFields. i.e. the component filters out some fields based on ui_type and column_name. Setting this property to false, will prevent it.

cxPropSearchEmptyMessage.description: The message to be displayed when no results are found after search.

cxPropAllSelectedMessage.description: The message displayed when all fields of a group are selected.

cxPropGroupLimitReachedInfo.description: The message displayed when the selected field count matches cxPropMaxAccordionColumns

cxPropEmptyListMsg.description: The message displayed when no fields are passed in cxPropFields.

cxPropMaxlength.description: The maxlength allowed for the search input.

cxPropMaxHeight.description: The max height applied to the parent div of the list.

cxPropPreventSortableOnDisabledFields.description: Set to true to prevent sortable on disabled fields.

cxPropSearchZcqa.description: The zcqa value for the search input.

cxPropFields.description: This property specifies the fields that are needed to be shown in the criteria editor.

cxPropModule.description: This specifies the module of the Criteria editor

cxPropModuleApiName.description: This specifies the module api name for the Criteria editor

cxPropSetCriteria.description: This property sets the criteria for the data to be given in the creteria editor.

cxPropMaxCount.description: This property specifies the maximum number of criteria rows that can be added after showing an alert.

cxPropRemovePattern.description: With this property, you can specify if the pattern has to be removed.

cxPropSpecifiedCondition.description: With this property, you can specify the mandatory condition to be provided. On setting this property, the user cannot edit the conditions.

cxPropShowLoggedInUser.description: With this property you can specify if the 'logged in user' field should be shown or not in the user dropdown.

cxPropEmptyShowYield.description: This property specifes if the yield has to be provided if the empty criteria is given in the view format.

cxPropShowNoneCondition.description: This property specifies if the None Field should be shown in the field dropdown.

cxPropModuleDisplayFieldMapping.description: This property is the map between the module and its respective display fields.

cxPropShowAllFields.description: This property when given true will show all the field that are provided to the criteria editor without any filteration. Normally criteria editor will filter the unsupported fields, hidden fields and unused fields.

cxPropShowHelp.description: With this property, you can choose to shown or hide the help icon.

cxPropHelpUrl.description: This property specifies the url to which the user should be redirected if the help icon is clicked.

cxPropBoundary.description: This property specifies the boundary of the criteria editor dropdown.

cxPropAppearance.description: With this property, you can set the appearance of the criteria editor in the create type. It can be either box or flat.

cxPropPrefixArray.description: This property is used to display more dropdown for filtering before a user can select the field. Dropdown like base module, child module can be used here, this property can also be used to show the criteria editor without the field comparator value section.

cxPropDropArray.description: This property is used to populate the dropdown when the cxPropPrefixArray is given.

cxPropDatePattern.description: With this property, you can define the date pattern for the dates to be used in the criteria editor.

cxPropModuleRecordMapping.description: This is the moduleRecordMapping data used in CRM. With this you provide the Consent Module fields when GDPR is enabled. This moduleRecordMapping data is also used for lookup fields in some scenarios.

cxPropDynamicColumns.description: This property when given true allows the developer to construct the prefix dropdown based on the input given in the previous dropdown. So the field comparator value section will also be displayed based on the input from the previous dropdowns.

cxPropTimeFormat.description: This property defines the time format which can be used in the criteria editor.

cxPropTimeZone.description: This property defines the time zone which can be used in the criteria editor.

cxPropTextMaxLimit.description: This property is used to provide the text area value limit to the criteria editor. By default, the criteria editor does not have a limit, but if needed it can be provided with this property.

cxPropCurrencyProperties.description: With this property you can define the currency details which can be used in the criteria editor.

cxPropTabIndex.description: This property sets the tabindex to all the actionable elements inside the criteria editor.

cxPropShowComparatorInView.description: This property is used to show the group operator of the condition between the criteria rows in the Criteria Summary or in the View.

cxPropSecondaryFields.description: This property is used to populate the secondary field of the criteria editor when field to field matching is expected.

cxPropSecondaryModule.description: This specifies the module of the secondary fields which is similar to the cxPropModule for the primary fields.

cxPropSecondaryModuleDisplayName.description: This property will display the secondary module when the secondary field is selected.

cxPropId.description: With this, you can pass an unique ID to the criteria editor, which is used for querySelection.

cxPropLayout.description: This property should be given if the value part is dependent  on a particular layout. Based on the given layout, you will be able to choose from the picklist values. This property is advised to use only for picklist values.

cxPropUserProperties.description: This property can be used to modify the properties of the user lookup value part.

cxPropColumnLabel.description: This property is used to show the label for each column of the criteria editor. The default column structure would be Field, Comparator and Value. The label would be added on the top of the column.

cxPropDataTypeMapping.description: On selecting a field, This property is used to group the data type of the field and show them together in the secondary fields. Normally criteria editor will match the data type when showing the secondary fields, if you want to match the data type with one or more data type you can use this property.

cxPropDynamicValueType.description: When this is given true, the user can choose from the options. With this property, you get to compare the primary field with the options given such as field or value.

cxPropDynamicValueTypeOptions.description: With this property, you can set the options for the property 'DynamicValueType'.

cxPropHideSecondayModuleName.description: On setting true, the secondary module name gets hidden in the selected seondary field display.

cxPropShowSecondaryFields.description: When setting true, the criteria editor works as Field to Field Comparator.

cxPropCriteriaForValue.description: On setting this property as true, the criteria editor works to  perform its function only when the valid value in criteria is given by the user.

cxPropDraggablePattern.description: Usually in criteria editor, the user types the pattern.  On setting this property as true, the user gets the flexibility to drag the rows in the pattern editor rather than tying it.

cxPropRoleSupport.description: On setting this property, the user can add the condition  'belong to' and 'does not belongs to' role conditon for the user lookup fields.

cxPropSortedFields.description: With this property, you can choose to sort the provided fields alphabetically.

cxPropHidePrimaryFieldInSecondary.description: This property is used to hide the primary field in the secondary field list when the similar two module fields are compared together.

cxPropFilterSecondaryFields.description: This proeprty is used to filter out the unsupported field from the secondary field given to the criteria editor.

cxPropShowInlineErrorMessage.description: This property is used to display the error message as inline message below the corresponding input.

cxPropShowPatternActionsAsText.description: This property is used to show the save and cancel in the edit pattern as text or as icons.

cxPropTooltipConfig.description: This is used to provide the configuration to the tooltips shown in the criteria editor.

cxPropShowErrorForEmptyCriteria.description: When this is given as true, we will throw the error for the empty criteria as well.

cxPropForceSetCondition.description: When this data is given as true the conditions will be fetched everytime the field is selected via the callbacks.

cxPropRoleProperties.description: This property is used to provide the configuration to the role value section when the role field is selected.

cxPropProfileProperties.description: This property is used to provide the configuration to the profile value section when the profile field is selected.
